problem id: ee4f1423
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) XOR NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  11011111 -> 11110001
  00011010 -> 10001111
  00110001 -> 01100110
  01101110 -> 01101100
  00110000 -> 01111110
  01110011 -> 01010100
  01000001 -> 11100101
  00101110 -> 01101110

query: 00001110
predicted answer: 01101111
